title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER C — Sara+Eva Tomorrow's Adventure twilight duo
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Tomorrows Adventure.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Dreamy twilight duo choreography.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — designed pastel sunset-gradient backdrop. SKY: deep coral pink at the top fading down softly through warm orange, gold, and finally a soft lavender-blue at the bottom, with tiny gentle twinkling stars beginning to appear at the top edge. GROUND: stylized soft silhouette dune-line at the bottom of the frame. NO real beach, NO real horizon, NO scene clutter, NO logos, NO real text. @sara-beach already on the LEFT and @eva-beach already on the RIGHT, both standing on the stylized dune floor with both feet planted side-by-side at slight angles to the camera. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — BOTH softly clasped together holding a tiny silver kid-flashlight at chest height. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both hands softly clasped EMPTY at chest height, NEVER holding the flashlight (the flashlight is Sara's prop). Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Mouths gently open in cheerful sing-along expression. Both girls perform a synchronized loop-clean dreamy duo dance: gentle hip-sway to the LEFT, gentle hip-sway to the RIGHT, both gently raise their clasped hands up softly toward the twinkly stars, both gently lower their clasped hands back to chest height, gentle shoulder-shimmy together, then return to standing facing the camera. Movements are RHYTHMIC, SOFT, DREAMY, and LOOPABLE. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Soft warm dreamy twilight lighting. The two girls hum and sing along generically — generic happy mouth movements, no specific lip-sync to specific words. Designed to LOOP cleanly: both girls return to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. NO third hand, NO fourth arm, NO floating hand from either girl. Each girl stays grounded with both feet on the stylized dune floor throughout — no leaping, no jumping.
